h1.visual_description: Bold, centered, sans-serif font, used for Table and Figure titles. Includes numbering (e.g., Table 15.6).
h1.example_text: Table 15.6. Observations of Returns on the Firm’s Portfolio of Investments...

h2.visual_description: Not explicitly present as a section header in this sample, but inferred as bold sans-serif left-aligned text based on figure caption style.

visual_matchers.pattern: Horizontal rule (thin line) spanning the width of the text block.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Separator used to bookend tables, figures, or distinct content blocks.

visual_matchers.pattern: Shaded gray header row in tables.
Parenthetical number at the far left of a centered equation.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (inline for variables like $r_t^P$, block for numbered equations using $$...$$)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric figure/table references (e.g., Figure 15.3) within the body text.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer contains chapter number, chapter title, and page number separated by a vertical pipe (e.g., 'Ch. 15. Homogeneous Risk Measures | 349').
